tools.name: search_available_slots
tools.description: Find open car-wash time slots near a location on a given day. Returns centers with their available slots and busyness level.

tools.name: find_centers
tools.description: List active car-wash centers within radiusKm of a latitude/longitude, nearest first.

tools.name: get_services
tools.description: List the services a center offers with a starting price each. centerId is the numeric id from find_centers.

tools.name: recommend_wash
tools.description: Recommend a wash formula for a vehicle given how dirty it is and the season. Pure guidance, no booking.

tools.name: get_booking
tools.description: Retrieve a booking the caller owns. Requires a Firebase phone-OTP token (Authorization: Bearer <idToken>); the booking is only returned when its phone number matches the verified caller.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_booking" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
